prompt: Thundering particle effect sprite loop, pixelated, dark theme for horror atmosphere.
prompt_refined: Generate a pixelated sprite image depicting a voluminous, thundering particle effect, centrally positioned. The effect should appear as a dense, forceful burst of dark energy or smoke. Utilize a predominantly dark and ominous color palette against a simple, dark background. The overall visual outcome should evoke a stark and unsettling horror atmosphere, suitable for a game asset sprite.
objects: dark energy (as part of the effect)
dark smoke (as part of the effect)
